metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for code review, PR management, knowledge management, and developer productivity

plugins.name: code-review-loop
plugins.description: Run code-review in a loop, verify findings, fix valid ones, and repeat until clean

plugins.name: knowledge-base
plugins.description: Manage knowledge-base projects: create, list, and execute implementation steps

plugins.name: merge-pr
plugins.description: Babysit a PR until it's merged

plugins.name: preferences
plugins.description: Load user preferences and CLAUDE.md instructions

plugins.name: terminal
plugins.description: Open any path in a new Terminal window
